scope.legacy_reader_use: structural_cross_check_only; not imported by greenfield runtime

structure_observations: train_data/train_label and val_data/val_label use same-basename patch pairing
patch files with .tif suffix contain mixed PNG and TIFF byte containers
sample PNG pair is 1024x1024 with RGB image and single-channel mask
test is organized as named large-scene image/mask directories
sample Lushan test image is 13365x14745 while its mask is 13366x14746 and their geotransforms differ
grouping_clues: patch basename is a record-pair key
test region directory is a scene clue
original parent scene for train/val patches is not encoded
modality_clues: optical RGB for confirmed PNG patches
mask_or_reference_clues: same-basename mask is native only for confirmed equal-grid patches

structure_observations: different-patch-size layout contains seven named region directories
comparison layout contains same-patch-size train/val/test NPY arrays
sample image array is float32 NCHW [4150,4,32,32]
sample label array is float32 NCHW [4150,1,32,32] with observed first-row range 0..1
first-axis index is an unambiguous virtual image/mask pair
grouping_clues: region directory and split are explicit
first-axis array index identifies a virtual patch
original large-scene identity and cross-layout duplication are unresolved
modality_clues: four-band optical-like tensor; band identities are not locally documented
mask_or_reference_clues: image and label virtual rows have the same native H/W

structure_observations: three sibling collections s2/s1asc/s1dsc pair by event token and sample number
sample grids share 128x128, EPSG:32736 and the same 10 m GeoTransform
each sampled file contains 15 time steps, DEM and MASK; S2 contains B02-B12/B8A/SCL and SAR contains VV/VH
sample annotated attribute is False in all three files
event_date/pre_post_dates metadata exist but are empty in the sampled files
mask_or_reference_clues: MASK is present on the same grid but sampled supervision flag is false

structure_observations: local tree contains TrainData/img and TrainData/mask only
same numeric suffix pairs image_1.h5 with mask_1.h5
sample HDF5 dataset img is float64 [128,128,14]
sample HDF5 dataset mask is uint8 [128,128] with observed range 0..1
no local README or license file was found
grouping_clues: numeric suffix is a patch-pair key
modality_clues: 14 source channels; exact band identities are not asserted from bytes alone

structure_observations: inner dataset root has rgb/dem/insar_vel/label and explicit train.txt/val.txt
same stem forms a four-asset record
sample assets are all 128x128 EPSG:4326 on matching transforms
sample RGB has three int16 bands, DEM is float32, InSAR-like asset is uint16, label is uint8
nodata values are present but InSAR units and sign convention are absent
mask_or_reference_clues: label shares H/W, CRS and transform with all sampled modalities

structure_observations: train/val/test Qwen-style JSONL rows reference one PNG image
same-basename PNG mask exists in mask directory
filenames encode apparent class text, numeric ID and web zoom level
assistant prose contains causal and physical claims that are not accepted as source truth
directory has no local README/license/provenance registry
grouping_clues: Level suffix removed as provisional multi-zoom group

structure_observations: five frozen caption indexes each bind data/caption/... image paths to conversation answers
local data/ prefix resolves to the source-root caption/ path
DIOR-RSVG first record binds normalized xyxy to a short region phrase
json/total.json and unrelated VQA/classification/detection directories are present but excluded
aggregate root has no license file and component terms remain separate
grouping_clues: exact image path is the provisional language parent key
mask_or_reference_clues: DIOR supplies box/phrase but no mask

structure_observations: RSICap top-level annotations bind filename to detailed text output
RSIEval top-level annotations bind filename to caption and QA pairs
both components use local images directories
RSIEval is permanently test-only under the frozen protocol
mask_or_reference_clues: original image is reference; no segmentation mask

structure_observations: benchmark records bind pre_image_path and post_image_path
tasks ask about disaster damage/change and may pair post optical or SAR
instruct tree contains pre/post image archives, box images and masks
local README declares CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0/noncommercial terms
mask_or_reference_clues: not evaluated because the source task violates the frozen single-time scope

next_required_work: resolve source licenses and named human eligibility decisions
select a single/contemporaneous Sen12 slice without pre/post reasoning
declare reviewed raster metadata dependencies and valid/nodata extraction
resolve multimodal InSAR units and sign convention

warnings: Five adapters emit audit-only candidates, never training records.
Four sources remain deliberately blocked rather than using legacy-reader fallback.
No source license was promoted during P1.3.
